steps.t: Imrahil can be found just outside the main gate of after-battle Minas Tirith. You can travel there from the Threshold of the City on the Pelennor batt…
Aragorn can be found in his pavilion on after-battle Pelennor. You should learn what plans Aragorn has and what help he might need.
Angbor and Éomer can be found at Aragorn's Pavilion on after-battle Pelennor. You should ask Angbor and Éomer whether their men are ready to march.
